meta.title: Antonio Caballero — Fullstack & Android Developer
meta.description: Fullstack & Android Developer with 14 years of experience building complete digital products.

hero.sub: 14 years building full digital solutions — from backend to native Android to brand identity.

about.label: About
about.text: Building digital products since 2010 — from concept to deployment. I've worked with small businesses and large corporations alike, taking ownership of the full product cycle: architecture, UI/UX, database design, backend, and frontend. I work well solo and in large teams, and I've led development teams of up to 5. When a project needs it, I can also handle branding, visual identity, and full interface design.

experience.label: Experience
experience.job1_desc: Web, mobile and native Android development. Node.js and PHP backends. Interface design, product architecture and client management.
experience.job2_desc: React, PHP, MySQL, Magento, TypeScript, Three.js. Custom frontend and backend features. Daily communication in English.
experience.job3_desc: React, React Native, Node.js, PHP, Symfony, Docker. Full-stack development, unit testing with JEST, project management.
experience.job4_desc: JavaScript and SVG aeronautics simulators for Airbus. E-learning platforms. International environment, daily English.
experience.job5_desc: Web development, mobile apps, SaaS platforms and e-learning. PHP, SQL, JavaScript. Graphic design and visual identity.
experience.job6_desc: Web development and design for an architecture studio in Genova. PHP, XML, ActionScript, JavaScript, CSS, HTML. International environment, daily English and Italian.

contact.availability: Available for freelance and full-time remote.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.riimbo_desc: Hardware and software product designed and built entirely solo. Node.js backend, three native Android apps in Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, Home Assistant integration via custom reverse tunnel. Photos, music, cinema and smart home — no monthly fees, no cloud, no privacy trade-offs. Hardware casing modelled in Blender. Corporate identity, photography and video produced entirely in-house.
portfolio.p02_desc: Landing and backoffice for an independent music platform. Publish albums, manage tracks, set pricing — ad-free and commission-free.
portfolio.p03_desc: Rural accommodation site for a 14-hectare estate in the Sierra de Aracena. Multilingual, booking calendar, gallery and virtual tour.
portfolio.p04_desc: Website and custom publishing platform for a non-profit in Seville. Multilingual in four languages including Arabic. Annual report management built in.
portfolio.p05_desc: Complete corporate identity for a moving company: logo, brand manual, typography, colour system and mockups on vehicles, signage and uniforms.
portfolio.p06_desc: Native Android music player built from scratch. Custom UI, ExoPlayer 3 queue system, Bluetooth and ducking support, lock screen controls, TV compatibility.
portfolio.p07_desc: Native Android photo and video backup app. Every capture goes automatically to the Riimbo device. Custom gallery interface.
